coverage_groups.name: instruction_dispatch
coverage_groups.description: Cover dispatch to all 5 execution unit types (exec, lsu, csr, mul, div)
coverage_groups.constraint: each unit must receive at least one valid dispatch, generic and unit-specific buses populated

coverage_groups.name: stall_conditions
coverage_groups.description: Cover all stall conditions: exec_hold, lsu_stall, interrupt, interrupt_inhibit, branch_taken, mul_hold
coverage_groups.constraint: each stall source must be triggered and result in fetch_accept=0

coverage_groups.name: branch_forwarding
coverage_groups.description: Cover branch result forwarding from exec and CSR units to fetch
coverage_groups.constraint: both exec and CSR branch sources must produce correct branch_request/branch_pc/branch_priv

coverage_groups.name: writeback_merging
coverage_groups.description: Cover writeback merge priority: exec > mem > mul > div
coverage_groups.constraint: each writeback source must be exercised at its correct priority level

coverage_groups.name: data_bypass_forwarding
coverage_groups.description: Cover bypass from all writeback sources (exec, mem, mul, div) for rs1 and rs2
coverage_groups.constraint: bypass must forward correct value when rs1/rs2 matches in-flight destination

coverage_groups.name: interrupt_handling
coverage_groups.description: Cover interrupt assertion and inhibit clear sequence
coverage_groups.constraint: interrupt must block dispatch, inhibit must clear when no branch/valid instruction

coverage_groups.name: fault_and_csr
coverage_groups.description: Cover fetch fault handling and CSR writeback output path
coverage_groups.constraint: faults must prevent regfile read and set invalid flag; CSR writeback must propagate

coverage_model.dispatch_coverage: all 5 execution unit types (exec, lsu, csr, mul, div) must receive at least one dispatch
coverage_model.stall_source_coverage: all 6 stall sources must be individually triggered
coverage_model.writeback_priority_coverage: writeback priority ordering (exec > mem > mul > div) must be verified
coverage_model.bypass_coverage: bypass from each writeback source for both rs1 and rs2 operand positions
coverage_model.regfile_interface_coverage: regfile setRd0I/Rd0ValueI called with correct values, regfile.process() called every cycle
